text.title: Bun Runtime (Simple) Core Rules
text.summary: 5 hard rules for a Bun-native service.

rule.statement: Use Bun built-ins (Bun.file, Bun.password, Bun.serve, bun:test) before reaching for npm packages.
rule.rationale: External packages negate Bun's startup + tree-shake wins.

rule.statement: Hono is the canonical router; Express is forbidden on Bun.
rule.rationale: Hono is Bun-native, edge-compatible, faster than Express on Bun.

rule.statement: Tests use bun:test (Jest-compatible API); Jest is forbidden.
rule.rationale: bun:test runs natively, no transpile step; perf gain is order-of-magnitude.

rule.statement: File I/O uses Bun.file (lazy streaming); node:fs only when interop required.
rule.rationale: Bun.file is lazy + streamable + faster than fs.readFile.

rule.statement: Password hashing uses Bun.password (Argon2id default); bcrypt is forbidden.

rationale.source: OWASP Password Storage Cheat Sheet; Bun docs

rule.rationale: Native, no compile step, Argon2id stronger than bcrypt by current OWASP recommendation.
